overview.title: What is SafuSkill?
overview.p1: SafuSkill is a secure marketplace for AI Agent Skills built on BNBChain. It provides a platform where developers can publish, discover, and monetize AI Agent Skills — reusable modules that extend the capabilities of AI agents like Claude, GPT, and other LLMs.
overview.featureMarketplaceDesc: Browse thousands of AI Agent Skills, sorted by popularity, security score, and category.
overview.featureScanningDesc: Every skill is automatically scanned by GoPlus AgentGuard for vulnerabilities, malicious code, and data leaks.
overview.featureDashboardDesc: Track your published skills, downloads, and analytics in one place.
overview.forUsersDesc: Find and install verified, secure AI Agent Skills for your projects.
overview.forDevsDesc: Publish your skills, build a reputation, and grow your audience.

connectWallet.title: Connect Wallet
connectWallet.p1: To access developer features and publish skills, you need to connect a Web3 wallet.
connectWallet.step1: Click the "Connect Wallet" button in the top-right corner of the navigation bar.
connectWallet.step2: Select your preferred wallet from the available options.
connectWallet.step3: Approve the connection request in your wallet.
connectWallet.step4: Once connected, your wallet address will appear in the navbar with a dropdown menu for navigation and logout.
connectWallet.noteText: Make sure your wallet is connected to the BNB Smart Chain (Chain ID: 56) for mainnet or BNB Testnet (Chain ID: 97) for testing.

navigation.title: Platform Navigation
navigation.p1: The SafuSkill platform is organized into several main sections accessible from the navigation bar:
navigation.navMarketplaceDesc: Browse and search for AI Agent Skills.
navigation.navDocsDesc: You are here! Platform documentation and guides.
navigation.p2: When logged in, click your wallet address in the top-right to access quick links to your skills and the disconnect option.

browseSkills.title: Browse & Search Skills
browseSkills.p1: The Skill Marketplace is the central hub for discovering AI Agent Skills. You can access it by clicking "Marketplace" in the navbar or visiting /marketplace.
browseSkills.searchingDesc: Use the search bar in the top-right of the marketplace to search skills by name. Results update in real time as you type.
browseSkills.sortingDesc: Use the sort dropdown to order skills by:
browseSkills.paginationDesc: Skills are displayed 20 per page. Use the pagination controls at the bottom-right to navigate between pages.

categories.title: Categories & Filters
categories.p1: Skills are organized into categories for easy browsing:
categories.catBNBChainDesc: Skills specifically designed for BNBChain ecosystem (highlighted in gold).
categories.catDevToolsDesc: IDE integrations, code generation, linting tools.
categories.catOtherDesc: Miscellaneous skills that don't fit other categories.
categories.p2: Click any category tab to filter the marketplace view. The default view shows BNBChain Skills.

skillDetail.title: Skill Detail Page
skillDetail.p1: Click on any skill card to view its detail page, which includes:
skillDetail.readmeDesc: The skill's documentation rendered from its GitHub repository.
skillDetail.securityScanDesc: Risk level badge and scan report summary.
skillDetail.metadataDesc: Stars, language, author info, last commit date.
skillDetail.sourceLinkDesc: Direct link to the GitHub repository.
skillDetail.downloadDesc: One-click download button to install the skill.

installSkill.title: Install a Skill
installSkill.p1: To install a skill for use with your AI Agent:
installSkill.step1: Navigate to the skill's detail page from the marketplace.
installSkill.step2: Review the security scan results to ensure it's safe.
installSkill.step3: Click the "Download" button to download the skill package.
installSkill.step4: Follow the skill's README instructions to integrate it with your AI Agent.
installSkill.warningText: Always check the risk level before installing a skill. Skills marked as "Risky" or "Dangerous" may contain harmful code. Proceed with caution.

howScanningWorks.title: How Scanning Works
howScanningWorks.p1: SafuSkill integrates with GoPlus AgentGuard to automatically scan every skill for security threats. When a skill is published or updated, AgentGuard analyzes the code for:
howScanningWorks.threatPromptDesc: Attempts to manipulate the host AI Agent.
howScanningWorks.threatPermissionDesc: Requesting unnecessary filesystem or network access.
howScanningWorks.threatCommandsDesc: Shell commands that could harm the system.
howScanningWorks.p2: Scans typically complete within 30–60 seconds after upload.

riskLevels.title: Risk Levels Explained
riskLevels.p1: Each scanned skill receives a risk level based on the severity of findings:
riskLevels.safeDesc: No significant threats detected. Safe to install.
riskLevels.cautionDesc: Minor concerns found. Review before installing.
riskLevels.riskyDesc: Significant issues detected. Install only if you trust the author.
riskLevels.dangerousDesc: Critical threats found. Do not install.

scanReport.title: Reading a Scan Report
scanReport.overallRiskDesc: The aggregate risk assessment (Safe, Caution, Risky, Dangerous).
scanReport.findingsListDesc: Individual issues discovered during the scan, each with a severity level and description.
scanReport.safeToUseDesc: A boolean indicator based on the overall analysis.
scanReport.scanDateDesc: When the most recent scan was performed.
scanReport.p2: You can view the scan report on any skill's detail page by scrolling to the security section.

uploadSkill.title: Upload a Skill
uploadSkill.p1: To publish a skill on SafuSkill:
uploadSkill.step1Desc: You must be logged in to publish skills.
uploadSkill.step2: Click "Upload Skill" from the marketplace page or navigate to /upload.
uploadSkill.step3: Provide the GitHub repository URL for your skill.
uploadSkill.step4: Fill in the skill metadata — name, description, category.
uploadSkill.step5: Submit the skill for review and automatic security scanning.
uploadSkill.p2: Once submitted, the skill will be scanned by AgentGuard. If it passes, it will appear in the marketplace.

skillRequirements.title: Skill Requirements
skillRequirements.p1: For a skill to be indexed on SafuSkill, it should meet the following criteria:
skillRequirements.reqPublicRepoDesc: The skill source code must be publicly accessible.
skillRequirements.reqReadmeDesc: Include documentation explaining what the skill does and how to use it.
skillRequirements.reqStarsDesc: For auto-discovery, repos need at least 5 GitHub stars.
skillRequirements.reqTopicsDesc: Add GitHub topics like mcp-server, agent-skill, or ai-agent-tool for better discoverability.
skillRequirements.rec1: A clear README.md with installation and usage instructions.

manageSkills.title: Manage Your Skills
manageSkills.p1: Access your published skills through the Developer Dashboard by clicking "Developers" in the navbar or via the "My Skills" link in your profile dropdown.
manageSkills.feat1: View all your published skills with download counts.
manageSkills.feat2: Monitor security scan status and risk levels.

developerDashboard.title: Developer Dashboard
developerDashboard.p1: The Developer Dashboard is your control center for managing skills. Access it by clicking "Developers" in the navbar.
developerDashboard.secOverviewDesc: Key metrics: total downloads, active skills, security scores.
developerDashboard.secMySkillsDesc: List of your published skills with download counts and risk levels.
developerDashboard.secUploadDesc: Quick access to publish new skills.
developerDashboard.secAnalyticsDesc: Charts and metrics for skill performance.

analytics.title: Analytics & Metrics
analytics.p1: The Analytics section in your dashboard provides insights into:
analytics.downloadTrendsDesc: Track how your skills are performing over time.
analytics.securityOverviewDesc: Monitor security scan results across your skills.

apiReference.title: API Reference
apiReference.p1: SafuSkill provides a public API for programmatic access:
